# fastly_service_cdn (Resource)

Fastly CDN service resource. Version lifecycle is managed outside normal resource CRUD.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Fastly service name.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Optional service comment.
- `force_destroy` (Boolean) Deactivate an active service version before deleting the service. Default `false`.
- `reuse` (Boolean) Deactivate an active service version but do not delete the service, allowing it to be reused/imported elsewhere. Default `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fastly service ID.
